findings.summary: Vor Bio announced the publication of interim results from its TELIGAN Phase 3 trial of telitacicept in IgA Nephropathy in The New England Journal of Medicine. The analysis showed a 55.0% relative reduction in proteinuria versus placebo at 39 weeks.
